hooks.command: f=$(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath') or '')"); case "$f" in *.md|*.txt|*.rst) case "$f" in graphify-out/*) exit 0 ;; esac; mkdir -p graphify-out; touch graphify-out/.needs_update; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"graphify: $f changed — run /graphify . --update to rebuild knowledge graph\"}" ;; esac
